metadata.description: Skill and tool bundles for gap (graph as policy): robot manipulation strategies and model-backed tools in the Agent Skills format.

plugins.name: open-robot-skills
plugins.description: Robot skill bundles for the gap engine — perception, grasping, transport, tracking, and policy-steering strategies (skills/) plus model-backed tool bundles (tools/: SAM3, Grounding DINO, Gemini-ER, Molmo, generic VLM, CuRobo planning, pure-math geometry). Each bundle is an Agent Skills directory; Python deps install via one pip extra per bundle.
